# Simple Fixture

> A tiny fake project used to exercise repoblender. It has a README, some source, and a config file.

## Root

- [.gitignore](.gitignore): *.log
- [README.md](README.md): A tiny fake project used to exercise repoblender. It has a README, some source, and a config file.
- [config.yaml](config.yaml): Fixture server configuration.

## src

- [src/helper.py](src/helper.py): Helper module for the simple fixture.
- [src/main.go](src/main.go): Package main is the entry point for the simple fixture.
